code: import{Truck,Package,CheckCircle2,AlertTriangle}from'lucide-react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const statDefinitions=[{key:'Pending',label:'To Be Picked',icon:Truck,color:'#facc15'},{key:'Shipped',label:'Shipped',icon:Package,color:'#3b82f6'},{key:'Delivered',label:'Delivered',icon:CheckCircle2,color:'#22c55e'},{key:'Urgent',label:'High Urgency',icon:AlertTriangle,color:'#ef4444'}];function StatCards(_ref){let{orders}=_ref;const counts={Pending:0,Shipped:0,Delivered:0,Urgent:0};for(const order of orders){if(order.status==='Pending')counts.Pending+=1;if(order.status==='Shipped')counts.Shipped+=1;if(order.status==='Delivered')counts.Delivered+=1;if(order.urgency===5)counts.Urgent+=1;}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"content-grid",style:{gridTemplateColumns:'repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr))',marginBottom:'14px'},children:statDefinitions.map(item=>{var _counts$item$key;const Icon=item.icon;const value=item.key==='Urgent'?counts.Urgent:(_counts$item$key=counts[item.key])!==null&&_counts$item$key!==void 0?_counts$item$key:0;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"preview-card",style:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'12px',borderLeft:`4px solid ${item.color}`},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{color:item.color,size:28}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:'#6b7280',fontSize:'.82rem',textTransform:'uppercase',letterSpacing:'.04em'},children:item.label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:'1.4rem',fontWeight:700},children:value})]})]},item.key);})});}export default StatCards;
